pulse: Vladimir and McGregor secretly aligned on survival; Donald's captain act crumbled, Bibi's mediation failed, Jinping watched the power shift.
scene: In the galley, Vladimir and McGregor agreed to run the ship together on survival terms. Donald slept in his suite convinced his authority held; Bibi lay awake sensing his mediation failing; Jinping rested quietly, observing.

day_summaries.1: Day 1: Donald appointed himself captain and imposed a six o'clock dinner protocol. Bibi kept the peace with chowder, McGregor did all the real work, Vladimir watched coldly from the deck unimpressed. By nightfall, Vladimir and McGregor had forged a practical alliance, and Donald's authority was already hollow.
